updates.benefit: Clients get an SMS confirmation the moment they book — no more 'did my booking go through?' messages to the owner.
updates.content_angle: Show the client side: they book, phone buzzes with confirmation in seconds. Zero anxiety.

updates.benefit: Owners can now block multiple days at once — entire weeks, not just single days. Calendar updates instantly for all clients.
updates.content_angle: Barber going on vacation without chaos — clients see 'not available' automatically, no need to text everyone.

updates.benefit: Each barber now has their own independent schedule — different hours, breaks, and days off. No more one-size-fits-all.
updates.content_angle: Shop with 3 barbers, each with different schedules. All managed in one place, clients see only their barber's availability.

updates.benefit: Salon owners can now add TikTok and Telegram links to their booking page — clients can follow them directly from the booking screen.
updates.content_angle: Your booking page is now also a social media hub. One link, everything the client needs.

updates.benefit: Booking page fully redesigned for phones — bigger buttons, faster loading, zero pinching or zooming. 90% of bookings happen on mobile.
updates.content_angle: Side-by-side: old cramped mobile view vs. new clean touch-friendly design. Night and day.
